title: mesosphaerum halimifolium
intro: Mesosphaerum halimifolium, also known as Mexican tea or false pennyroyal, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America. It is used for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, thanks to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. Mesosphaerum halimifolium can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or essential oil, and is also used in herbal remedies and traditional medicine.
